title: Make config files idempotent — never overwrite user configs on deploy
summary: Gitignored real config files so git pull never overwrites them; added _protect_configs/_restore_configs to tac-update.sh; created config_validator.py with OWNER/structural checks; wired validation into daemon startup (exits 3 on FATAL); added GET /api/config/validate dashboard endpoint. Local and LXC configs updated to kryptobaseddev (no OWNER placeholders).

title: Operator Log panel + Queue button GitHub issue creation
summary: Added operator_log SQLite table with logOperatorAction() helper. GET /api/operator-log endpoint returns chronological feed. queueTask() now creates a GitHub issue labeled adw — T026 queued successfully, created issue #9. Daemon sync loop logs new runs every 30s. OperatorLog.vue collapsible panel added to sidebar with 5s polling, source icons, clickable task/issue links, inline command input. All operator actions (note, status, command, queue) now logged.
